opinion.h1: NAT. BISCUIT CO. v. PENNSYLVANIA, 357 U.S. 571 (1958)
opinion.h4: NATIONAL BISCUIT CO. v. PENNSYLVANIA. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF PENNSYLVANIA, MIDDLE DISTRICT. No. 990. Decided June 30, 1958.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Roy J. Keefer and Leslie M. Swope for appellant.
Thomas D. McBride, Attorney General of Pennsylvania, and George W. Keitel, Deputy Attorney General, for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
